patterns: attendance kam ho to kya problem hogi
can i give exam with 60 percent attendance
kitni attendance par exam allowed hai
low attendance ka kya effect hota hai
responses: College me minimum 75% attendance required hoti hai
Agar attendance kam hai to exam dene me problem ho sakti hai
Try karo attendance improve karne ka before exams
Short attendance par fine ya restriction lag sakta hai

patterns: mujhe 2 din ki chhutti leni hai
leave application ka format kya hai
can i take leave for personal reason
leave approval ka process kya hai
responses: Leave ke liye written application dena hota hai
Medical leave ke liye certificate bhi lag sakta hai
Class teacher ya HOD se approval lena hota hai
Proper reason mention karna zaruri hota hai

patterns: project ki last date kya hai
assignment delay hone par kya hoga
deadline extend ho sakti hai kya
responses: Assignment ki deadline next week hai
Late submission par marks cut ho sakte hain
Try to submit before last date
Extension sirf valid reason par mil sakta hai

patterns: can i carry phone in exam
exam hall me kya le jana hai
cheating pakde gaye to kya hoga
responses: Mobile phone exam hall me allowed nahi hai
Admit card aur ID card le jana compulsory hai
Cheating karne par strict action liya jata hai
Exam instructions dhyan se follow karo
Classes usually 9 AM se start hoti hain
Detailed timetable notice board par available hai
Schedule department ke hisaab se vary karta hai
Check karo latest timetable for updates

patterns: kitni books issue kar sakte hai
fine kab lagta hai library me
books return late ho to kya hoga
can i sit and study in library
responses: Library 9 AM se 5 PM tak open hoti hai
Aap 2 ya 3 books issue kar sakte ho
Late return par fine lagta hai
Library me baith kar study kar sakte ho
Fees ki last date check karo notice board par
Late payment par extra charge lag sakta hai
Online aur offline dono mode available hain
Fees status accounts section se check karo
Hostel facility limited seats ke saath available hai
Room allotment merit basis par hota hai
Hostel ke apne rules aur timings hote hain
Details ke liye hostel office contact karo
Canteen me snacks aur meals available hote hain
Timing usually 8 AM se 4 PM tak hoti hai
Prices reasonable hote hain for students
Menu daily change ho sakta hai

patterns: documents kya chahiye scholarship ke liye
responses: Scholarship ke liye online apply karna hota hai
Eligibility criteria scheme par depend karta hai
Required documents me income certificate aur marksheet hoti hai
Details official website par check karo
